RULING - The matter is Discussed. The Court received a late contest by email last Saturday to requesting to deny the motion. Defendant is unable to be present. The Court reads the email on the record. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF ENCARNITA ALONSO's Motion To Lift Stay Of Action Issued On Arbitration Grounds.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling. Plaintiff Encarnita Alonso's motion to lift stay of action issued on arbitration grounds is granted. The court orders the stay lifted and the matter restored to calendar because of the arbitration's termination due to Defendants' failure to pay arbitration fees. (Dhillon Decl., Exh.9). (See Cinel v. Christopher (2012) 203 Cal.App.4th 759, 769 n.11 ["the arbitration proceedings had not taken place due to failure to pay fees, and thus the trial court regained full jurisdiction, in the language of the statute, at 'such earlier time as the court' specified."].)

Defendant Gurbaksh Cahal's late-filed objection to the motion lacks merit. Cahal asserts that the motion was not properly served on Defendants, but the proof of service reflects that it was served on Defendants by overnight mail on May 1, 2019 at the address they provided to JAMS in connection with the arbitration, as well as on counsel to Defendant Gravity4, Inc. in California and Delaware. In any event, Defendant admits that he learned of the motion, and the Court has considered his objection. The objection does not dispute Plaintiff's showing that the arbitration was terminated due to Defendants' failure to pay the arbitration fees. Further, Cahal appears to be under the misimpression that Plaintiff is seeking a default judgment, rather than simply to lift the stay. Defendants' assertions regarding the merits of the underlying action can be raised in the course of the litigation, once the stay is lifted. (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript)

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)
